title: Exposure: Middle-Earth edition
description: An unofficial Middle-Earth-compatible version of Exposure
body:
### **What is this mod?**

An unofficial version of [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) by mortuusars, made to play harmoniously with the [Middle-Earth](https://modrinth.com/mod/middle-earth). The mod doesn't change the original Exposure code in any way, only assets and data.

### **How to use it?**

This mod requires a Middle-Earth (obviously) and the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). Installing the original Exposure is not required. For the best gaming experience, installing the mex (Middle-Earth exposure) datapack is highly recommended.

### **What does the mod add?**

**Crafting recipes** for camera, films, camera stand, and lightroom have been changed. All items are available for crafting in Middle-earth, and all necessary resources are obtained in this dimension.

<details>
<summary>Crafting recipes</summary>


![Crafting recipe changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/495ac58dc8e4a6d1fa2bcb0a0441f3a18efe0adb.png)

Color film is developed using a Morsel. Gunpowder can be crafted from coal, any firecap and ash. 
The camera and film appearances are taken from [Tuttas Retextures: Exposure Edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tuttas-retextures-exposure-edition). Some textures have been slightly modified to match the crafting recipes.



</details>


**The Interplanar Projector** has been replaced with the Palantir Lens. The recipe, error screen, and sounds have been updated.

<details>
<summary>Palantir</summary>


![Palantir recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836cd1379e318c35bc255076535e07c3abeafb2b.png)


</details>


**Advancements** have been moved to a separate tab and reworked. All of them can now be obtained without leaving Middle-earth. Various new achievements have been added, such as one for taking photos in all locations along Frodo and Bilbo's journeys. There are also some very difficult and unexpected achievements. Good luck getting them!

<details>
<summary>Advancements tab</summary>


![Updated advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf19f9cc6879a212d01e45f6dc7816af5727694d.png)
Exposure advancements tab with mex datapack



</details>


The mod adds **custom photographs**. With the mex datapack, they will generate in structure chests in Middle-earth, and some are extremely rare. Completing collection of photos from a single themed set will earn you an advancement. Completing the entire collection will give you the final advancement. Explore the world and obtain unique images!

<details>
<summary>Custom photographs</summary>


![examples of custom photographs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad775506c150327304ff6fbc10003c69a99f4fcb.png)



</details>


If anything seems strange or absurd to you, remember: this mod adds a camera to the Tolkien's world.
